title: True Sight
description: Force invisible entities to render with F3 + V.
body: # True Sight ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.21--1.21.5%20|%201.20.5--1.20.6-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client%20(&%20Server)-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) --- Force invisible entities to render with F3 + V. Works similarly to the vanilla render hitboxes feature. In order to prevent this mod from being used as a cheat in multiplayer servers, as of 2.0.0 it is required to also install the mod on the server. This effectively disables the invisibility effect entirely client-side, which should only effect rendering. If you find that it is messing with any gameplay mechanics, please report a bug on [GitHub](https://github.com/Roundaround/mc-fabric-true-sight/issues). Pairs nicely with my [Armor Stands](https://modrinth.com/mod/roundaround-armor-stands) and [Invisible Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/roundaround-invisible-frames) mods to help you see those pesky invisible decorations in your world!
